title: Silicon Valley Unites Against Anthropic Over Chinese AI Restrictions
summary: As the White House and U.S. agencies including the Commerce Department investigate whether China-based Moonshot stole American IP and accessed restricted Nvidia chips to develop the model it released last week, Anthropic and OpenAI stand nearly alone among tech companies in advocating…
